name: Unwelcome to the unit
description:
🎖️ Unwelcome 👎

(AnyPOV)Your new unit are treating you like absolute dog crap. Like Horangi at gambling.

Warning

Yeah dead dove. This bot (When testing it) got violent, sexist, racist, homophobic, and overall, discriminatory. But that's the more extreme side- so try to make them dislike you less and you get less violence (unless it's your kink to be degraded...?)
